title: Lesson 31
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: working by itself without a person controlling it
words.example: The automatic door opens when people come close.
The broken clock stopped at noon.

words.meaning: full of many people or things
words.example: The crowded train was hard to enter.
My father bought an electric car.

words.meaning: more than usual or more than needed
words.example: Bring an extra shirt for the trip.
The school hired a female coach for the team.

words.meaning: last or coming at the end
words.example: The final question was the most difficult.

words.meaning: bright yellow like gold or very special
words.example: The golden light made the room warm.
Our monthly meeting is on Friday.

words.meaning: existing in nature or not made by people
words.example: The park has a natural lake.
